message:
fix(version): change stale binary advice from 'gt install' to 'make install'

The previous advice 'gt install' was misleading - that command creates a new
Gas Town HQ, not update the binary. Changed to 'make install' which correctly
rebuilds and installs the binary.

Fixes bd-51yk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
